headline: Is Enphase Energy (ENPH) Cheap On Earnings Or Expensive On Cash Flow?
summary: Enphase Energy stock presents an immediate valuation tension, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate pointing to a premium over the current fundamentals, while market based multiples suggest the shares may be pricing in more caution than the broader sector. Over the last 5 years Enphase Energy has delivered a share price return of about 76.7% in decline, which places the current valuation debate against a backdrop of significant long term drawdown. On the one hand,...
